message: ci: make event publish retry failures explicit

files.patch:
@@ -297,15 +297,15 @@ jobs:
           }
 
           publish_once() {
-            git fetch origin main
-            git reset --hard origin/main
-            rm -f "$report_path"
+            git fetch origin main || return
+            git reset --hard origin/main || return
+            rm -f "$report_path" || return
             pnpm run apply-artifacts -- \
               --target-repo "$TARGET_REPO" \
               --artifact-dir artifacts/event \
               --skip-reconcile \
               --skip-dashboard \
-              --replay-closed-artifacts
+              --replay-closed-artifacts || return
             pnpm run apply-decisions -- \
               --target-repo "$TARGET_REPO" \
               --item-numbers "$ITEM_NUMBER" \
@@ -319,24 +319,24 @@ jobs:
               --comment-sync-min-age-days 0 \
               --progress-every 1 \
               --skip-dashboard \
-              --report-path "$report_path"
-            synced_count="$(node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8")); console.log(r.filter((x)=>x.action==="review_comment_synced").length)' "$report_path")"
-            closed_count="$(node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8")); console.log(r.filter((x)=>x.action==="closed").length)' "$report_path")"
+              --report-path "$report_path" || return
+            synced_count="$(node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8")); console.log(r.filter((x)=>x.action==="review_comment_synced").length)' "$report_path")" || return
+            closed_count="$(node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs"); const r=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8")); console.log(r.filter((x)=>x.action==="closed").length)' "$report_path")" || return
             for record_path in \
               "records/$target_slug/items/$ITEM_NUMBER.md" \
               "records/$target_slug/closed/$ITEM_NUMBER.md"
             do
               if [ -e "$record_path" ]; then
-                git add "$record_path"
+                git add "$record_path" || return
               fi
             done
             if git diff --cached --quiet; then
               echo "No event result changes"
               write_event_summary
               return 0
             fi
-            git commit -m "chore: apply event sweep result for $target_slug#$ITEM_NUMBER"
-            git push
+            git commit -m "chore: apply event sweep result for $target_slug#$ITEM_NUMBER" || return
+            git push || return
             write_event_summary
           }
